patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Bricolage Grotesque, Figtree, JetBrains Mono.
<AccordionItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, title, content.
<AgentRunStep> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, title, detail, children, defaultOpen, status, time.
<AgentRunStep> status must be one of 'done' | 'active' | 'pending' | 'error'.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, icon, title, description, action, children, style, className.
<Alert> tone must be one of 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<AspectRatio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: ratio, children, style, className.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, src, size.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, size, dot, children.
<Badge> tone must be one of 'neutral' | 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'brand'.
<Badge> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md'.
<Banner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, icon, action, onAction, onDismiss, children, style, className.
<Banner> tone must be one of 'neutral' | 'brand' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<BarChart> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: data, height, highlightLast, labels, formatValue, style, className.
<BreadcrumbItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, href, onClick.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, iconLeft, iconRight, fullWidth, loading, children.
<Button> variant must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger' | 'brand'.
<Button> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<ButtonGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children.
<ButtonTile> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, title, description, selected, disabled, onClick, style, className.
<Calendar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, onChange, style, className.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, subtitle, actions, footer, padding, elevated, interactive, children.
<Carousel> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, itemWidth, gap, showControls, showDots, ariaLabel, style, className.
<ChatMessage> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: role, name, time, streaming, actions, children, style, className.
<ChatMessage> role must be one of 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description.
<CitationSource> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, url, domain, description.
<CodeBlock> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: lang, title, maxHeight, children, style, className.
<Collapsible> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, defaultOpen, open, onOpenChange, children, style, className.
<ComboOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label, icon.
<CommandItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, hint.

<Confirmation> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, description, tone, state, defaultState, onStateChange, icon, approveLabel, rejectLabel, approvedNote, rejectedNote, children, style, className.
<Confirmation> tone must be one of 'default' | 'danger'.
<Confirmation> state must be one of 'pending' | 'approved' | 'rejected'.
<Confirmation> defaultState must be one of 'pending' | 'approved' | 'rejected'.
<ConfirmDialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, onConfirm, title, description, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, tone, typeToConfirm, children.
<ConfirmDialog> tone must be one of 'danger' | 'primary'.
<ConsoleEntry> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: level, time, text, stack, source.
<ConsoleEntry> level must be one of 'log' | 'info' | 'warn' | 'error' | 'debug'.
<ContextMenuItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, kbd, danger, disabled, onClick.
<Conversation> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: height, autoStick, jumpLabel, padding, children, style, className.
<CopyField> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, secret, style, className.
<DatePicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, defaultValue, onChange, placeholder, style, className.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, title, description, footer, width, children.
<DiffLine> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: type, text.
<DiffLine> type must be one of 'add' | 'del' | 'ctx'.
<DigitEntry> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: length, value, onChange, onComplete, label, invalid, disabled, style, className.
<Divider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, vertical, style, className.
<DocumentCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, meta, icon, collapsedHeight, defaultOpen, onCopy, actions, children, style, className.
<DonutSlice> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, color.
<Drawer> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, title, footer, width, side, children.
<Drawer> side must be one of 'left' | 'right'.
<EmptyState> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, title, description, action, bordered, style, className.
<EnvVar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, value, secret.
<ExceptionFrame> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: fn, loc, active, internal.
<FeedbackBar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: onFeedback, copyText, onCopy, onRetry, note, style, className.
<FileDrop> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: onFiles, accept, multiple, title, hint, style, className.
<FileTile> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, kind, status, progress, error, onRemove, actions, style, className.
<FileTile> kind must be one of 'image' | 'video' | 'audio' | 'code' | 'archive' | 'doc'.
<FileTypeIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: ext, size, showExt, style, className.
<GeneratedImageAction> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, label, onClick.
<HoverCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: trigger, children, side, openDelay, closeDelay, width, style, className.
<HoverCard> side must be one of 'top' | 'bottom'.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, strokeWidth, title, className, style.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, label, variant, size.
<IconButton> variant must be one of 'quiet' | 'outline' | 'solid'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, hint, error, iconLeft, size, invalid.
<Input> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<InputGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, hint, error, prefix, suffix, size.
<InputGroup> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Kbd> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, style, className.
<KeyValueItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, mono.
<Label> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: htmlFor, required, hint, children, style, className.
<LinePoint> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value.
<Link> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: external, icon, variant, standalone, children.
<Link> variant must be one of 'default' | 'quiet'.
<ListItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, media, title, description, trailing, chevron, onClick, href, style, className.
<Loader> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, dots, duration, children, style, className.
<Loader> variant must be one of 'pulse' | 'shimmer'.
<MenuItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, danger, disabled, kbd, onClick.
<MenubarItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, kbd, danger, disabled, onClick.
<ModelOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, name, provider, hint, badge.
<PageControl> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: count, index, onChange, label, style, className.
<Pagination> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: page, pageCount, onChange, style, className.
<PaymentCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, number, expiry, network, variant, frozen, style, className.
<PaymentCard> variant must be one of 'espresso' | 'caramel' | 'paper'.
<PlayerHandle> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: jumpTo, play, pause.
<Popover> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: trigger, children, align, width, open, onOpenChange, style, className.
<Popover> align must be one of 'left' | 'right'.
<Progress> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, max, label, showValue, format, tone, style, className.
<Progress> tone must be one of 'default' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<PromptComposer> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onChange, onSend, placeholder, rows, disabled, attachments, hint, style, className.
<PromptStep> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, question, options, other.
<Radio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description.
<Reasoning> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: streaming, duration, label, defaultOpen, open, onOpenChange, children, style, className.
<Resizable> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: direction, defaultRatio, min, max, onRatioChange, children, style, className.
<Resizable> direction must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<ComposerItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, description, group, keywords.
<SandboxTab> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, content.
<ScrollArea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: maxHeight, height, children.
<SegmentOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, disabled.
<Select> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, hint, options, size, invalid.
<Select> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<SelectionAction> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon.
<SideNavItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, badge.
<Skeleton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, width, height, lines, style, className.
<Skeleton> variant must be one of 'text' | 'rect' | 'circle'.
<Slider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, showValue, format, min, max, step, value, defaultValue, onChange, disabled, style, className.
<SourceCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: href, title, description, domain, favicon, icon, thumbnail, variant, onClick, style, className.
<SourceCard> variant must be one of 'card' | 'plain'.
<Sparkline> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: data, width, height, direction, strokeWidth, area, style, className.
<Sparkline> direction must be one of 'up' | 'down' | 'flat'.
<Spinner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, label, style, className.
<Stat> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, delta, direction, hint, style, className.
<Stat> direction must be one of 'up' | 'down' | 'flat'.
<StatusDot> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: state, label, pulse, style, className.
<StatusDot> state must be one of 'ok' | 'warn' | 'err' | 'busy' | 'off'.
<StepItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, title, description.
<SuggestionItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, icon.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, size.
<Switch> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md'.
<TableColumn> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: key, label, width, align, numeric, render.
<TableColumn> align must be one of 'left' | 'center' | 'right'.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, count.
<Tag> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, onRemove, onClick, children.
<TaskItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, label, detail.
<TerminalLine> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: text, type, time.
<TerminalLine> type must be one of 'cmd' | 'out' | 'ok' | 'err' | 'info'.
<Textarea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, hint, error, invalid.
<Toast> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, title, description, actionLabel, onAction, onClose, style, className.
<Toast> tone must be one of 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<TodoItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, status.
<TodoItem> status must be one of 'pending' | 'progress' | 'done'.
<Toggle> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: pressed, defaultPressed, onPressedChange, value, icon, size, children.
<Toggle> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md'.
<ToolbarItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, icon, label, tip, disabled, onClick.
<ToolCall> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, status, args, result, error, streaming, onApprove, onReject, approveLabel, rejectLabel, icon, defaultOpen, children, style, className.
<ToolCall> status must be one of 'pending' | 'approval' | 'running' | 'success' | 'error'.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, position, children, style, className.
<Tooltip> position must be one of 'top' | 'bottom'.
<TopNav> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, leading, children, style, className.
<TranscriptWord> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: t, w.
<TreeNode> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, count, children.
<UsageMeter> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: used, limit, label, unit, cost, hint, warnAt, animated, format, style, className.
<WebPreviewLog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: level, text.
<WebPreviewLog> level must be one of 'log' | 'info' | 'warn' | 'error'.
